title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 12 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 12/07/2022
Image reference: 2022-07-12_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-july-12-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Older Panamax values have firmed
Post Panamax BC Celine Oldendorff (93,000 DWT, Jan 2010, COSCO Dalian) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 20.00 mil, VV Value USD 17.48 mil. Panamax Van Continent (74,500 DWT, Jan 2007, Hudong Zhonghua) sold to HNA Technology Investments Holdings for USD 18.50 mil, VV Value USD 15.49 mil - SS Passed. Ultramaxes Golden Cathrine and Golden Cecilie (60,300 DWT, Jan/Feb 2015, Japan Marine United) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 63.00 mil, VV Value USD 59.60 mil - DD Passed.
